AC1.summary: Executor retries from cold recovery context on tool-state mismatch instead of failing immediately.

AC2.summary: Recovery clears warm continuation and rebuilds context from SQLite user/assistant history plus recent tool summaries.

AC3.summary: Unit tests cover recovery-context construction and mismatch detection.

AC4.summary: Reliability docs now describe cold recovery for proxy-side tool-state loss.

AC5.summary: Relevant unit tests and build pass.
